title: NMPA Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Deputy Chief Engineer Posts
description: The New Mangalore Port Authority (NMPA) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Deputy Chief Engineer Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Civil Engineering can apply for the NMPA Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection proce...
